movie.actors: Macaulay Culkin, Elijah Wood, Wendy Crewson, David Morse
movie.plot: Following his mother's death, Mark is sent to Maine to visit his aunt and uncle while his father goes on a business trip to Tokyo. Mark meets his cousin, Henry, and the two quickly form a friendship. However, Henry begins to show signs of violent behavior that worry Mark.
movie.title: The Good Son
